DP.212.0000:
Hello, my name’s Cheryl.
And you are...?\f
OK, so your name is [0103,0000].
I’m sincerely glad to meet you.\f
[0103,0000], may I ask a big favor
of you?\f
I want to get through this forest,
but I’m afraid of doing it alone.\f
I’ve heard that there is a sinister
group of people called Team Galactic\r
about.\f
I think there’d be safety in numbers.
Please, may I go through with you?\f
DP.212.0002:
Cheryl: I’ll keep your Pokémon
in perfect health.
DP.212.0003:
Cheryl: Oh, hi, [0103,0000]!
I’ve been waiting like I said.\f
Let’s get through this forest
together.\f
DP.212.0004:
Cheryl: Oh? Are you going back?
I’ll wait here for you, then.\f
DP.212.0005:
Cheryl: Oh! There’s the exit!
I’m so relieved... We finally got here.\f
I would’ve never been able to get
through this by myself.\f
Thank you so much, [0103,0000]!\f
DP.212.0006:
I’m sure we’ll meet again somewhere!
Bye for now!\f
DP.212.0007:
My Pokémon got poisoned, and now
it can’t battle.\f
I knew I should’ve loaded up on
Antidotes at the Poké Mart!
DP.212.0008:
The rock is covered in moss.
It feels pleasantly cool.
DP.212.0009:
Gardenia: Hiya! Were you intrigued
by the rumors going around, too?\f
DP.212.0010:
You know, people’ve been talking
about the ghost Pokémon of the Old\r
Chateau.\f
I’ve been hearing rumors about
sinister shadows, too.\f
DP.212.0011:
I should check it out myself, but
going in there is...\f
...Well, you know, being that I’m
a Gym Leader, I’m always busy.\f
So, since I’m so busy, I can’t go in.
It’s not because I’m s-scared!\f
S-so, good luck with your
investigation!\f
DP.212.0012:
Eterna Forest
Where Time Stands Still
DP.212.0013:
Trainer Tips!\f
In forests and caves, there are many
items on the ground that cannot be\r
seen in the murky darkness.\f
Take the time to search carefully!
